rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Striking Filings; Of Order Denying Continuance Of July 16 Discovery Hearings; Of
rulings.Rulings: The Motion for Reconsideration of Order Striking Filings is denied. Code of Civil Procedure section 1013(a), on which Ms. Ballonoff would rely, plainly applies only to a "time period or date [that] is prescribed by statute or rule of court." As she recognizes in her motion papers, the time period with which Ms. Ballonoff failed to comply was set by order, not statute or rule of court. Therefore, section 1013(a) did not give her five additional days. The deadline was clearly stated, and her failure to comply was not excusable. To the extent any other relief is sought it is moot. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing for the sceduled hearing must so advise opposing counsel and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. Wednesday, August 12, 2015.
